sequence.variables:
sample_rate = float(250000000,1e7,5e9) mw_freq = float(3.8751e+09, 1e9, 15e9) detuning = float(0,-100e6,100e6) freqIQ = float(50e6, 0,500e6)
length_rabi_pulse = float(52e-9, 0, 0.5) length_last_wait = float(1e-6, 0, 0.5) mod_depth = float(0.3,0,1)
mw_ampl = float(-5, -20, 15) ampIQ = float(5,-30,17) %in dBm
%adiabatic inversion %full_expt = float(1,0,1); full_expt = float(0,0,1); do_adiabatic_inversion = boolean(1)
sweep_range = float(100e6, 5e6, 500e6) sweep_time = float(1e-6, 20e-9, 20e-6)
%delay_wrt_1mus = float(-0.88e-6,-0.1,0.1) % 1DExp-seq-Rabimodulated-vary-delay_wrt_1mus-2022-09-29-182523 %OLD -2.17e-6 calibrated by PL curve 11-08-05 13-17-48 delay_wrt_1mus = float(0.2e-6,-0.1,0.1) % DLnsec LASER 1DExp-seq-Rabimodulated-vary-delay_wrt_1mus-2023-10-09-183857 wait_time = float(2e-6, 0,1) switch_delay = float(1.000000000000000e-07, -1e-6,1); pumping_time = float(1e-6,0,1);
